summary: A mobile survival typing game where letters spawn around the player and move inward. The player types matching letters to destroy them before they reach the player. The goal is to survive as long as possible.
core_loop: Letters spawn around the player, move toward the center, and must be typed correctly to be destroyed. The player survives as long as possible.
player_fantasy: The player feels like they are defending themselves by typing quickly and accurately under pressure.
fail_condition: A letter enemy reaches the player.
difficulty_model: Difficulty increases over time by shorter spawn intervals, slightly faster average movement, and more overlapping pressure. For M1, only basic speed variation: slow letters and fast letters.

scenes.name: Main Menu
scenes.purpose: Provide entry point to start game.

scenes.name: Gameplay
scenes.purpose: Main gameplay loop where letters spawn and player types.

scenes.name: Fail / Result Popup
scenes.purpose: Display survival time and options to retry or return to menu.

hud_elements: optional small status text for testing
layout_notes: Gameplay must reserve bottom screen space for the mobile keyboard.
HUD should not overlap important enemy movement area.
Fail popup should clearly show end of run and retry option.

entities.name: Letter Enemy
entities.role: spawns around player, moves inward, requires matching letter to destroy.
behavior_notes: spawns at random positions around player

entities.name: Player
entities.role: center of screen, receives typed input, destroys matching letters.

out_of_scope: advanced enemy types beyond basic speed variation
acceptance_criteria: screen layout works with mobile keyboard
survival loop is understandable within seconds
players want to retry for a better survival time
open_questions: Exact spawn interval and speed progression over time
